Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy

Class SimplifyTermStrategy

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.StaticFeatureCollection
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.AbstractFeatureStrategy
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.JavaCardDLStrategy
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.SimplifyTermStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Feature, Strategy, Named
public class SimplifyTermStrategy extends JavaCardDLStrategy
Strategy used to simplify Terms in side proofs.
